name: a11y-debugging
tagline: Chrome DevTools MCP workflow for accessibility debugging: ARIA, contrast, focus order, and tap targets, per web.dev guidance.
verdict: Concrete, well-sequenced a11y debugging workflow with specific MCP tool calls and troubleshooting fallbacks for contrast and focus checks. Weak spots: no exclusion/negative-trigger guidance despite overlap with the general chrome-devtools skill, no defined output/report format, and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere despite overlap with the general chrome-devtools MCP skill.
No defined report/output shape — workflow ends in ad hoc troubleshooting advice with no artifact or summary format specified.
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
